name: Hebrew Calendar
tagline: Jewish calendar, Hebrew date conversion, and Shabbat/holiday times
description: Fetch Jewish holidays and calendar events, convert between Gregorian and Hebrew dates, and retrieve halachic times such as candle lighting and Havdalah for a location and date.

auth.hint: Hebcal web APIs are free and do not require registration or an API key. A shared free service applies rate limiting of roughly 90 requests per 10-second window (HTTP 429 when exceeded).

tools.name: get_jewish_calendar
tools.description: Fetch Jewish calendar events and holidays for a given year, month, or date range.

params.name: v
params.description: API version. Must be 1.

params.name: cfg
params.description: Output format: json (default REST), fc (FullCalendar.io JSON), rss, ics (iCalendar), or csv.

params.name: year
params.description: Gregorian or Hebrew 4-digit year; use now for the current year.

params.name: month
params.description: Single Gregorian month 1-12, or x for the entire year (default).

params.name: maj
params.description: Include major holidays (Rosh Hashana, Yom Kippur, Pesach, etc.).

params.name: min
params.description: Include minor holidays (Tu BiShvat, Lag B'Omer, etc.).

params.name: i
params.description: Diaspora (off, default) or Israel (on) holiday/Torah reading schedule.

params.name: geonameid
params.description: GeoNames.org numeric city identifier used for location-dependent items like candle lighting times.

tools.name: convert_date
tools.description: Convert a single date or date range between the Gregorian and Hebrew calendars.

params.name: cfg
params.description: Output format; must be json for range queries.

params.name: g2h
params.description: Set to 1 for Gregorian-to-Hebrew conversion; mutually exclusive with h2g.

params.name: h2g
params.description: Set to 1 for Hebrew-to-Gregorian conversion; mutually exclusive with g2h.

params.name: date
params.description: Gregorian date (YYYY-MM-DD) for single-date g2h mode.

params.name: hy
params.description: Hebrew year, used for h2g mode.

params.name: hm
params.description: Hebrew month name, used for h2g mode.

params.name: hd
params.description: Hebrew day 1-30, used for h2g mode.

tools.name: get_zmanim
tools.description: Fetch halachic times (zmanim), including Shabbat candle lighting and Havdalah, for a date and location.

params.name: cfg
params.description: Output format; must be json.

params.name: date
params.description: Single Gregorian date (YYYY-MM-DD); defaults to today if neither date nor start/end are given.

params.name: start
params.description: Range start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: end
params.description: Range end date (YYYY-MM-DD), capped at 180 days from start.

params.name: geonameid
params.description: GeoNames.org numeric city identifier for the location to compute times for.

params.name: zip
params.description: 5-digit US ZIP code, used as an alternative location to geonameid.
